sentences.target: Ich frage mich, ob das funktioniert.

translations.de: Ich frage mich, ob das funktioniert.
translations.fr: Je me demande si ça marche.
translations.pt: Estou me perguntando se isso funciona.
translations.tr: Bunun işe yarayıp yaramadığını merak ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi tự hỏi liệu cái đó có hoạt động không.
translations.nl: Ik vraag me af of dat werkt.
translations.hi: मैं सोच रहा हूँ कि यह काम करेगा या नहीं.
translations.nb: Jeg lurer på om det fungerer.
translations.da: Jeg undrer mig over, om det virker.
translations.ja: それが動くかどうか気になっている。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; heads the matrix clause.
Reflexive/object personal pronoun, accusative, 1st person singular; complements 'frage' in the reflexive construction 'sich fragen'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a yes/no indirect question as a complement clause.
Demonstrative pronoun, neuter nominative singular; subject of the embedded clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicate of the embedded clause.

sentences.target: Er weiß nicht, ob sie mitkommt.

translations.de: Er weiß nicht, ob sie mitkommt.
translations.en: He doesn’t know if she’s coming along.
translations.fr: Il ne sait pas si elle vient.
translations.yue: 佢唔知佢會唔會一齊嚟。
translations.ru: Он не знает, придёт ли она.
translations.pt: Ele não sabe se ela vem.
translations.he: הוא לא יודע אם היא באה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không biết cô ấy có đi cùng không.
translations.ar: هو لا يعرف إن كانت ستأتي معه.
translations.nl: Hij weet niet of zij meegaat.
translations.uk: Він не знає, чи вона поїде з ними.
translations.hi: उसे नहीं पता कि वह साथ आएगी या नहीं.
translations.pl: On nie wie, czy ona pójdzie z nimi.
translations.el: Δεν ξέρει αν θα έρθει μαζί.
translations.nb: Han vet ikke om hun blir med.
translations.id: Dia tidak tahu apakah dia akan ikut.
translations.sv: Han vet inte om hon följer med.
translations.ro: El nu știe dacă ea vine.
translations.da: Han ved ikke, om hun tager med.
translations.fi: Hän ei tiedä, tuleeko hän mukaan.
translations.ja: 彼は彼女が一緒に来るかどうか分からない。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Negation particle; scopes over the proposition of the main clause.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a yes/no indirect question complement.
Personal pronoun; here most likely 3rd person singular feminine nominative subject of the embedded clause (could also be plural in other contexts).
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; separable prefix verb with 'mit-' attached in clause-final position of the subordinate clause.

sentences.target: Ich will wissen, ob du Zeit hast.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl ˈvɪsən, ɔp duː tsaɪ̯t hast./

translations.de: Ich will wissen, ob du Zeit hast.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl ˈvɪsən, ɔp duː tsaɪ̯t hast./
translations.en: I want to know if you have time.
translations.fr: Je veux savoir si tu as du temps.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想知道你有没有时间。
translations.ru: Хочу знать, есть ли у тебя время.
translations.pt: Quero saber se você tem tempo.
translations.he: אני רוצה לדעת אם יש לך זמן.
translations.tr: Senin vaktin olup olmadığını bilmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn biết bạn có thời gian không.
translations.ar: أريد أن أعرف إن كان لديك وقت.
translations.nl: Ik wil weten ob je tijd hebt.
translations.uk: Хочу знати, чи в тебе є час.
translations.hi: मैं जानना चाहता हूँ कि तुम्हारे पास समय है या नहीं.
translations.el: Θέλω να ξέρω αν έχεις χρόνο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil vite om du har tid.
translations.id: Aku ingin tahu apakah kamu punya waktu.
translations.sv: Jag vill veta om du har tid.
translations.ro: Vreau să știu dacă ai timp.
translations.da: Jeg vil vide, om du har tid.
translations.ja: あなたに時間があるか知りたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive main verb; complement of the modal 'will'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the embedded yes/no question.
2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the embedded clause.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'hast' in the embedded clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; predicates possession of 'Zeit'.

sentences.target: Es ist egal, ob wir jetzt gehen.
sentences.reading: /ɛs ɪst eˈɡaːl, ɔp viːɐ̯ jɛtst ˈɡeːən./

translations.de: Es ist egal, ob wir jetzt gehen.
translations.ipa: /ɛs ɪst eˈɡaːl, ɔp viːɐ̯ jɛtst ˈɡeːən./
translations.en: It doesn’t matter if we go now.
translations.es: Da igual si nos vamos ahora.
translations.fr: Peu importe si on part maintenant.
translations.ru: Не важно, пойдём ли мы сейчас.
translations.vi: Không sao nếu chúng ta đi bây giờ.
translations.nl: Het maakt niet uit of we nu gaan.
translations.uk: Все одно, чи підемо ми зараз.
translations.hi: अभी चलें तो कोई फर्क नहीं पड़ता.
translations.pl: To bez znaczenia, czy pójdziemy teraz.
translations.nb: Det spiller ingen rolle om vi går nå.
translations.id: Tidak masalah kalau kita pergi sekarang.
translations.sv: Det spelar ingen roll om vi går nu.
translations.da: Det er lige meget, om vi går nu.
translations.ja: 今行くかどうかは関係ない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive pronoun in nominative; syntactic subject with copular 'ist'.
Copular auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate complement.
Predicate adjective meaning 'it doesn't matter'; complements the copula 'ist'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the embedded clause expressing the condition/content.
1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the embedded clause.
Temporal adverb modifying the embedded clause's verb.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural (form identical to infinitive); clause-final position in the subordinate clause.

Er weiß nicht, ob sie mitkommt.
Ich will wissen, ob du Zeit hast.
Es ist egal, ob wir jetzt gehen.
fu: /ɪç vɪl ˈvɪsən, ɔp duː tsaɪ̯t hast./
/ɛs ɪst eˈɡaːl, ɔp viːɐ̯ jɛtst ˈɡeːən./

/ɛs ɪst eˈɡaːl, ɔp viːɐ̯ jɛtst ˈɡeːən./

I want to know if you have time.
